productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girl's Jolene Pink Kidswear
description: CompositionWhite shorts made of 100% cotton, with ribbed elasticated waist with twill tape drawstring, with two patch pockets on the back, pink piping on the side continuing to leg hems, and with appliqued number near hem  FittingRegular Waist - 22-24 inches Wash care Machine wash Cold water Wash with like colours Wash/dry inside out Use mild detergents Do not tumble dry Use warm iron Do not iron on decor Remove all detachable accessories Get ready to indulge your little girl in the spirit of summer with these white shorts from gini and jony. Team this with pink tees and comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with her small buddies, while the soft fabric stays soft on her skin and keeps her fresh and comfortable all day.
